root_text.an2.151:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ santhārānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammasanthāro”ti.
root_text.an2.152:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ paṭisanthārānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammapaṭisanthāro”ti.
root_text.an2.153:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ esanānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammesanā”ti.
root_text.an2.154:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ pariyesanānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammapariyesanā”ti.
root_text.an2.155:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ pariyeṭṭhīnaṁ yadidaṁ dhammapariyeṭṭhī”ti.
root_text.an2.156:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ pūjānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammapūjā”ti.
root_text.an2.157:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ ātitheyyānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammātitheyyan”ti.
root_text.an2.158:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ iddhīnaṁ yadidaṁ dhammiddhī”ti.
root_text.an2.159:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imāsaṁ dvinnaṁ vuddhīnaṁ yadidaṁ dhammavuddhī”ti.
root_text.an2.160:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ ratanānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammaratanan”ti.
root_text.an2.161:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ sannicayānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammasannicayo”ti.
root_text.an2.162:1.5: Etadaggaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ dvinnaṁ vepullānaṁ yadidaṁ dhammavepullan”ti.

translation_text.an2.151:1.1: “There are these two kinds of welcome.
translation_text.an2.151:1.3: Welcome in things of the flesh and welcome in the teaching.
translation_text.an2.151:1.4: These are the two kinds of welcome.
translation_text.an2.151:1.5: The better of these two kinds of welcome is the welcome in the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.152:1.1: “There are these two kinds of hospitality.
translation_text.an2.152:1.3: Hospitality in things of the flesh and hospitality in the teaching.
translation_text.an2.152:1.4: These are the two kinds of hospitality.
translation_text.an2.152:1.5: The better of these two kinds of hospitality is hospitality in the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.153:1.3: The quest for things of the flesh and the quest for the teaching.
translation_text.an2.153:1.5: The better of these two quests is the quest for the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.154:1.3: The search for things of the flesh and the search for the teaching.
translation_text.an2.154:1.5: The better of these two searches is the search for the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.155:1.1: “There are these two kinds of seeking.
translation_text.an2.155:1.3: Seeking for things of the flesh and seeking for the teaching.
translation_text.an2.155:1.4: These are the two kinds of seeking.
translation_text.an2.155:1.5: The better of these two kinds of seeking is seeking for the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.156:1.1: “There are these two kinds of worship.
translation_text.an2.156:1.3: Worship of things of the flesh and worship of the teaching.
translation_text.an2.156:1.4: These are the two kinds of worship.
translation_text.an2.156:1.5: The better of these two kinds of worship is worship of the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.157:1.1: “There are these two ways of serving guests.
translation_text.an2.157:1.3: Serving guests with things of the flesh and serving guests with the teaching.
translation_text.an2.157:1.4: These are the two ways of serving guests.
translation_text.an2.157:1.5: The better of these two ways of serving guests is to serve them with the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.158:1.3: Success in things of the flesh and success in the teaching.
translation_text.an2.158:1.5: The better of these two successes is success in the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.159:1.1: “There are, mendicants, these two kinds of growth.
translation_text.an2.159:1.3: Growth in things of the flesh and growth in the teaching.
translation_text.an2.159:1.4: These are the two kinds of growth.
translation_text.an2.159:1.5: The better of these two kinds of growth is growth in the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.160:1.3: The treasure of things of the flesh and the treasure of the teaching.
translation_text.an2.160:1.5: The better of these two treasures is the treasure of the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.161:1.1: “There are these two kinds of accumulation.
translation_text.an2.161:1.3: Accumulation of things of the flesh and accumulation of the teaching.
translation_text.an2.161:1.4: These are the two kinds of accumulation.
translation_text.an2.161:1.5: The better of these two kinds of accumulation is the accumulation of the teaching.”
translation_text.an2.162:1.1: “There are, mendicants, these two kinds of increase.
translation_text.an2.162:1.3: Increase in things of the flesh and increase in the teaching.
translation_text.an2.162:1.4: These are the two kinds of increase.
translation_text.an2.162:1.5: The better of these two kinds of increase is increase in the teaching.”

reference_text.an2.151:1.1: csp1ed15.92, csp2ed15.92, ms15A2_244, msdiv152, pts-vp-pli1.93.1, vri35.112
